## Question

**What would you like to know?**

**What type of question?**
- [ ] How to use the project
- [ ] How to contribute
- [ ] Technical question
- [ ] Setup question
- [ ] Configuration question
- [ ] Best practices
- [ ] Troubleshooting
- [ ] Architecture question
- [ ] Performance question
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**What have you tried so far?**
Describe what you've already attempted to find the answer.

**Where did you look for answers?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Issues
- [ ] Discussions
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] External resources
- [ ] Stack Overflow
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Urgency level**
- [ ] Urgent (blocking work)
- [ ] High (needed soon)
- [ ] Medium (can wait)
- [ ] Low (curiosity)

**Related to**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about your question here.

**Note**: Questions help improve documentation and help others with similar issues!

**Note**: Don't hesitate to ask - no question is too simple!

**Note**: Clear questions get better answers!

**Note**: If you find the answer yourself, please share it to help others!
